meta.summary: TransDecoder 6.0.0 for identifying candidate coding regions in transcript sequences and projecting ORFs to genome coordinates.
meta.description: TransDecoder 6.0.0 for identifying candidate coding regions in transcript sequences and projecting ORFs to genome coordinates.

test: TransDecoder --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'TransDecoder 6.0.0' >/dev/null && (TransDecoder --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'TransDecoder - full pipeline wrapper' >/dev/null && (TransDecoder --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'blast_search_pep' >/dev/null && (TransDecoder.LongOrfs -h 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Transdecoder.LongOrfs' >/dev/null && (TransDecoder.Predict -h 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'retain_blastp_hits' >/dev/null && perl -MURI::Escape -e1 && diamond version 2>&1 | grep -F 'diamond version' >/dev/null && blastp -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastp:' >/dev/null && makeblastdb -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'makeblastdb:' >/dev/null && hmmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && hmmpress -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && hmmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && ParaFly -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'ParaFly' >/dev/null && ffindex_from_fasta -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'ffindex_from_fasta' >/dev/null

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-transdecoder-transcript-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; gunzip -c /opt/transdecoder/sample_data/simple_transcriptome_target/Trinity.fasta.gz > "$tmp/Trinity.fasta"; TransDecoder -t "$tmp/Trinity.fasta" -m 50 -T 50 --single_best_only --no_refine_starts -O "$tmp/out" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.pep"; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.cds"; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.gff3"; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.bed"; fasta_prot_checker.pl "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.pep" > "$tmp/check.log" 2>&1; grep -F 'ORF type:' "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.pep" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-transdecoder-phases-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; gunzip -c /opt/transdecoder/sample_data/simple_transcriptome_target/Trinity.fasta.gz > "$tmp/Trinity.fasta"; TransDecoder.LongOrfs -t "$tmp/Trinity.fasta" -m 50 -O "$tmp/out" > "$tmp/longorfs.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder_dir/longest_orfs.pep"; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder_dir/longest_orfs.cds"; TransDecoder.Predict -t "$tmp/Trinity.fasta" -T 50 --single_best_only --no_refine_starts -O "$tmp/out" > "$tmp/predict.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.pep"; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.cds"; test -s "$tmp/out/Trinity.fasta.transdecoder.gff3"; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-transdecoder-homology-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; gunzip -c /opt/transdecoder/sample_data/cufflinks_example/test.genome.fasta.gz > "$tmp/test.genome.fasta"; gunzip -c /opt/transdecoder/sample_data/cufflinks_example/transcripts.gtf.gz > "$tmp/transcripts.gtf"; gunzip -c /opt/transdecoder/sample_data/cufflinks_example/mini_sprot.db.pep.gz > "$tmp/mini_sprot.db.pep"; gunzip -c /opt/transdecoder/sample_data/cufflinks_example/mini_Pfam-A.hmm.gz > "$tmp/mini_Pfam-A.hmm"; TransDecoder --genome "$tmp/test.genome.fasta" --gtf "$tmp/transcripts.gtf" --blast_search_pep "$tmp/mini_sprot.db.pep" --blast_tool diamond --blast_threads 1 --pfam-search-db "$tmp/mini_Pfam-A.hmm" -m 50 -T 50 --single_best_only --no_refine_starts -O "$tmp/out" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/out/transcripts.cDNA.fasta.transdecoder.pep"; test -s "$tmp/out/transcripts.cDNA.fasta.transdecoder.gff3"; test -s "$tmp/out/transcripts.cDNA.fasta.transdecoder.genome.gff3"; test -s "$tmp/out/transcripts.cDNA.fasta.transdecoder_dir/blastp.outfmt6"; test -s "$tmp/out/transcripts.cDNA.fasta.transdecoder_dir/pfam.domtblout"; grep -F 'mRNA' "$tmp/out/transcripts.cDNA.fasta.transdecoder.genome.gff3" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: TransDecoder
upstream.citation: Haas et al. 2013. De novo transcript sequence reconstruction from RNA-seq using the Trinity platform for reference generation and analysis; TransDecoder is distributed by the Trinity/TransDecoder project.
